orchestrator.description: Orchestrates the harness development pipeline across spec-generator, implementer, and verifier subagents

spec-generator.description: Produces ultra-technical SDD documents for each task: exact file changes, struct signatures, data flow, test plan, edge cases

implementer.description: Reads an SDD and implements the specified changes, then verifies compilation

verifier.description: Runs tests and compilation checks after implementation; reports pass/fail with details
